### step1: download zip

![](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/40284411/566164974-e45e4dd5-ce68-4c79-9372-7162931a4dba.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RtZ-_6Jjx25OS_rIfjv4_4LKVTCFkcVGIbWtFQQWEOU)

### step2:Unzip the file RFIDToolsForThailand-main.zip to the folder RFIDToolsForThailand-main

![](C:\Users\Luca%20Hu\AppData\Roaming\marktext\images\2026-03-19-18-06-40-image.png)

### step3: Try the standard installation first, and if that doesn't work, try a direct application launch.

![](C:\Users\Luca%20Hu\AppData\Roaming\marktext\images\2026-03-19-18-07-04-image.png)

### step4: If the program interface appears, it means the program has launched successfully，then switch to the "Bind tags" panel and click open directory button,you can find where is the app is installed.

![](C:\Users\Luca%20Hu\AppData\Roaming\marktext\images\2026-03-19-18-09-30-image.png)

### step5:copy the Data、 x64 and x86 files to the directory of the app.

![](C:\Users\Luca%20Hu\AppData\Roaming\marktext\images\2026-03-19-18-10-23-image.png)

![](C:\Users\Luca%20Hu\AppData\Roaming\marktext\images\2026-03-19-18-10-42-image.png)

### step6: If data appears after clicking the query button, it indicates that the program is running correctly.

![](C:\Users\Luca%20Hu\AppData\Roaming\marktext\images\2026-03-19-18-11-59-image.png)
